title: Snoova
content:

{{Quote|I heard you're looking for Snoova. You've found him. I don't like people who ask questions about me.|translated=1|Snoova|<ref name="GH LSS" />}}
'''Snoova''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was ostracized from Wookiee society and faced the [[Death mark/Legends|death penalty]] on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], due to his [[Madclaw|violation]] of the Wookiee injunction against the use of his [[Species/Legends|species]]' natural claws for anything other than climbing, which rumors indicated Snoova broke when slashing at an opponent in a brawl over the affections of a [[Gender/Legends|female]] Wookiee paramour. Snoova escaped Kashyyyk and turned to a life of [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunting—an unusual profession for a member of his species—and mercenary work. Because Wookiees were an [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] species under the regime of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Snoova specifically pursued bounties posted by the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] government, and his successes gained him such renown that he was able to travel through the Empire with impunity.

Snoova had a unique appearance: [[Color/Legends|brown]] fur splotched with black, head-[[Hair/Legends|hair]] cut into a flat-topped [[Spacer/Legends|spacer's]] style, and a [[monocle ocular enhancer]] worn over his right [[Eye/Legends|eye]] until he had it surgically rooted in his eye socket to replace his right eye. Snoova preferred to work alone, but he occasionally teamed up with associates from [[Aurodium Sword/Legends|Aurodium Sword]] and the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal organizations, as well as with fellow bounty hunters, such as the [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]]. Snoova's fame inspired the [[Human replica droid]] [[Guri]] to disguise another well-known Wookiee, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[operative]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], as Snoova in an effort to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] him past customs in [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]], where Chewbacca was a wanted Rebel agent.

==Biography==
===A hunter's origins===
{{Quote|Meet Snoova, a well-known Wookiee bounty hunter.|Guri, after disguising Chewbacca as Snoova|<ref name="SOTE 22">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref>}}
[[File:Snoova_-_SWGTCG.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Snoova fled Kashyyyk under mysterious circumstances and became a mercenary and bounty hunter.]]
Snoova was a native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of his [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]. He fled the planet for unconfirmed reasons, though rumors suggested that he had gotten into a fight with a family member over the affections of a Wookiee [[Gender/Legends|female]]. The story held that in the altercation, Snoova attacked and maimed his rival with his climbing [[Claw/Legends|claws]], a capital offense in Wookiee society,<ref name="SotESB" /> and earned himself the designation of "[[madclaw]]."<ref name="GH LSS">{{SWGTCG|set=Galactic Hunters|scenario=Light Side scenario campaign}}.</ref> Snoova was forced to flee to avoid the [[Death mark/Legends|death mark]] placed on his head,<ref name="AGttSWU3 493">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''.</ref> and for the remainder of his life, he lived as an [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exile]] from Wookiee society.<ref name="SaV 112" />

Snoova took to [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] stints as he made his way in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. He worked for a [[Time/Legends|time]] as an indentured servant to a small-time [[Crime lord/Legends|crime boss]] named [[Asteria]], but as soon as his contract expired, he moved on to bigger pursuits. The Wookiee eventually picked up [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]], an unusual line of work for a Wookiee at the time.<ref name="SotESB" /> As the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] raged throughout the galaxy,<ref name="SaV 112" /> Snoova's species was officially [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]; therefore, Snoova relegated himself to Imperial [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and pursued bounties posted by the Empire. Such practices afforded him freedom of movement in spite of his species' enslavement, as although he was technically enslaved, his [[Identichip/Legends|identification datawork]] listed him as belonging to himself.<ref name="SotESB" /> At some point, Snoova lost an [[Eye/Legends|eye]] in pursuit of a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]].<ref name="SaV 112" /> He had it replaced with a [[monocle ocular enhancer]] [[Eye patch/Legends|eye patch]] that he had previously worn as a [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] aid.<ref name="SotESB" /> After the surgery, the device connected to [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetics]] hidden in his right eye socket.<ref name="SaV 112" />

===Working with others===
{{Quote|I turned in my captive to Imperial officers here at Dee'ja Peak. Wait…I did see another bounty hunter. He said he'd escort the prisoners, but didn't mention the destination.|translated=1|Snoova to Rebel agents, on Bossk|<ref name="GH LSS" />}}
[[File:Aurodium_Sword.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Although he preferred to work alone, Snoova worked for a time with Aurodium Sword.]]
Although he preferred to operate alone,<ref name="SotESB" /> Snoova occasionally worked with various criminal organizations<ref name="AGttSWU3 493" /> and partnered with fellow bounty hunters and mercenaries. He worked alongside the [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] bounty hunter [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]] on at least one occasion.<ref name="SotESB" /> At another point, Snoova worked for or with [[Aurodium Sword/Legends|Aurodium Sword Executive Security]], a mercenary organization that provided security and paramilitary support to high-ranking clients. The Wookiee participated in a [[Unidentified Aurodium Sword skirmish|skirmish]] alongside the group's leader, a rogue [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] known as [[Muzzle/Legends|Muzzle]], as well as [[Unidentified Wookiee mercenary|another Wookiee]] while defending a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Unidentified Sullustan executive|executive]] from a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]]. An image captured from the fight made its way to an [[Unidentified Imperial intelligence agent|Imperial intelligence agent]], who filed a report on Aurodium Sword with the Empire. A few [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Maximillian Seerdon]] of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] included the report and image in his dossier on various underworld figures. Although pictured, Snoova was not named in the document.<ref name="UAGoSaV" />

At some point, Snoova worked as a mercenary for the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal syndicate. When the Empire posted the [[Emperor's Most Wanted]], a list of high-stakes bounties on critical [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] leaders, sometime after the [[Battle of Talus]], Snoova was among the bounty hunters who hunted for the individuals named. He captured a bounty from the list and delivered his quarry to a fellow bounty hunter, [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], at the [[Dee'ja Peak/Legends|Dee'ja Peak]] Imperial outpost on the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="GH LSS" />

{{Gamemechanics|Galactic Hunters|''Galactic Hunters'' "Light Side" scenario campaign}}
Meanwhile, witnesses spread rumors of the capture, and Rebel agents, posing as [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], arrived at Dee'ja Peak to search out Snoova and reclaim his Rebel bounty. The Wookiee's contacts warned him of the Rebel stalkers, so Snoova lay in wait and surprised the interlopers. Near the center of the outpost, their leader was pushed into an alley, where Snoova and several Black Sun thugs attacked. The Wookiee bounty hunter was wounded during the long and vicious [[Skirmish at Dee'ja Peak|firefight]], and his Black Sun associates fled. Reluctantly, Snoova answered the Rebel's questions and put them on the trail of Bossk, who knew the [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]]' location.<ref name="GH LSS" />
{{Endgame}}

===Captured and impersonated===
{{Quote|Whether or not you remember my face for the rest of time does not concern me. For now suffice it to say that our purposes require you to be previously disposed, or 'out of the picture,' as you bounty hunters are so fond of saying. In another reality, let us say that your twin is paying a visit to Coruscant. For now, please enjoy what hospitality we are capable of offering an enraged Wookiee.|Black Sun Vigo Lonay to an imprisoned Snoova|<ref name="OOTP">{{WEGCite|story=Out of the Picture|book=Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook}}</ref>}}
By [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Snoova was well-known,<ref name="SOTE 22" /> his fame such that he was the most famous Wookiee bounty hunter in the galaxy.<ref name="GH Snoova">{{SWGTCG|set=Galactic Hunters|cardname=Snoova (Avatar)}}.</ref> That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] Rebel Alliance leader, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], sought the aid of the [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], head of Black Sun, in her efforts to rescue her fellow Rebel, Human smuggler [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who had fallen into the clutches of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] bounty hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. Organa also sought information on who was trying to assassinate her friend, the Human [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].<ref name="SOTEc 4">[[Shadows of the Empire 4|''Shadows of the Empire'' 4]]</ref> Because Organa and her Wookiee companion, [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], were well-known members of the Rebel Alliance, they required a means of sneaking past the Imperial customs agents waiting for them in [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]], the galactic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where Black Sun's headquarters was located. Black Sun agreed to help them do so, and they decided that Chewbacca should be disguised as Snoova.<ref name="SOTE 22" />

[[File:SnoovaChained-SotESourcebook.png|thumb|right|300px|Lonay approaches a chained Snoova.]]
Meanwhile, Snoova unwittingly became part of Black Sun's Rebel deal. As he was leaving a meeting with Asteria in [[Asteria's townhouse|her townhouse]], the Wookiee was ambushed by thugs with [[Stun baton/Legends|shock batons]], [[Force pike/Legends|stun pikes]], and [[tranq slug]]s. The bounty hunter was unable to fight them off, and when he next awoke, found himself in a tiny cell, his arms chained above his head and his hands encased in mitts to prevent him from lashing out with his claws. Eventually, the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Lonay]] informed the prisoner that he had been taken "out of the picture" for a time and locked up at a slave camp so that someone could impersonate the hunter on Coruscant. Despite Snoova's angry threats and attempts to break free, the Twi'lek told the Wookiee that he would receive substantial recompense for the arrangement.<ref name="OOTP" /> 

With Snoova hidden safely away, the Black Sun [[Human replica droid]], [[Guri]], disguised Leia Organa as the Ubese hunter Boushh and dressed Chewbacca in Snoova's distinctive look. As part of his disguise, Chewbacca shaved the top of his head into a squared-off style and dyed black spots into his fur. Chewbacca also carried Snoova's preferred weapons: a [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-ax]] and large [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]]. Their disguises successfully allowed both of them passage through customs on Coruscant, and they were eventually welcomed by Prince Xizor into his [[Xizor's Palace]] and removed their disguises.<ref name="SOTE 22" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|You don't know much about bounty hunters, do you? We're not chatty.|translated=1|Snoova|<ref name="GH LSS" />}}
[[File:Snoova_-_GH.jpg|thumb|left|Although Snoova preferred close combat to gunplay, one of his favored weapons was a heavy blaster rifle.]]
By 3 ABY, Snoova was well known among the galactic fringe.<ref name="SOSOTE 240">''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''</ref> Other bounty hunters were cautious around him,<ref name="SotESB" /> as he had a reputation as brutal and [[Blood/Legends|bloodthirsty]] due to his explosive temper and unbridled anger;<ref name="SaV 112" /> even in his best moments, Snoova's sour demeanor manifested in irritable growling at even the most minor of nuisances. The Wookiee showed little concern for decorum or niceties, and he was not afraid to bully others to get what he wanted from them.<ref name="SotESB" /> Of the few practicing Wookiee bounty hunters during the Galactic Civil War, Snoova earned a reputation as the most vicious.<ref name="AGttSWU3 493" /> Snoova rejected Wookiee society's interdiction against the use of climbing claws in combat. Instead, the Wookiee bounty hunter preferred his natural weapons in close combat as a means to maim his enemies,<ref name="SotESB" /> and he relented to [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] only when necessary.<ref name="TCG OTP">{{SWGTCG|set=The Price of Victory|cardname=One-Two Pummel}}.</ref> The proclivity earned him the designation of ''madclaw'' and made him an outcast in Wookiee society.<ref name="GH LSS" /> For the most part, however, Snoova comported himself well with his clients, and when such dealings annoyed him, the Wookiee took out his aggressions on his prey.<ref name="SotESB" />

Snoova was somewhat paranoid and preferred to work alone. He disliked allegiances with other bounty hunters because he was never sure they would not betray him and claim the bounty on his head from the Wookiees of Kashyyyk. Likewise, Snoova steered clear of fellow Wookiees, as he knew that the [[Death/Legends|death]] mark on his head meant they might subject him to Wookiee law—the death penalty—for his madclaw status.<ref name="SotESB" /> Nevertheless, Snoova allied with a fellow Wookiee while working for Aurodium Sword,<ref name="UAGoSaV" /> and with other bounty hunters on occasion when he felt it expedient.<ref name="SotESB" />

Snoova's [[Color/Legends|brown]] coat featured distinctive black spots, including a mask-like patch of fur across his eyes.<ref name="CSWE III 171">{{CSWECite|III|171|Snoova}}.</ref> The pattern was unusual for a Wookiee, and it earned Snoova the nickname "the furry bandit" from other bounty hunters—although no one used the soubriquet to his face<ref name="SotESB" />—and made him instantly recognizable.<ref name="AGttSWU3 493" /> Snoova enhanced his unique appearance by keeping his [[Hair/Legends|hair]] styled in a short [[Spacer/Legends|spacer's]] cut characterized by a short flattop and ponytail.<ref name="SotESB" /> Snoova's breath smelled foul at least on occasion.<ref name="OOTP" /> The prefix ''Sno-'' in Snoova's name meant "curious," "fast," and "quick" in his native [[Language/Legends|language]], [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]], and the suffix -ova meant "eye," "gazer," "seeker," and "seer."<ref name="Callsigns: Names of Kashyyyk">{{GamerCite|10|Callsigns: Names of Kashyyyk}}</ref>

==Skills and abilities==
{{Quote|I have been called far worse, hunter. And yes, your mitts are meant to keep you from inflicting unnecessary damage upon my staff and facilities.|The Black Sun Vigo Lonay to a captive Snoova|<ref name="OOTP" />}}
[[File:Snoova_CCG.jpg|thumb|right|Snoova's cybernetic monocle ocular enhancer gave him enhanced visual acuity.]]
Snoova was a skilled fighter, competent with the [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcasters]] typically preferred by his species but equally adept with a blaster, with additional skill and training in the use of [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blasters]].<ref name="SotESB" /> Snoova was proficient in the use of melee weapons and blaster rifles,<ref name="SaV 112" /> the latter class of weaponry he wielded with brute force and little concern for finesse.<ref name="GH SHBR" /> The Wookiee excelled most of all at [[Unarmed combat/Legends|hand-to-hand brawling]], a pursuit to which he was able to apply his natural climbing claws to shred his opponents.<ref name="SotESB" />

Streetwise and savvy, Snoova was able to navigate the galaxy's criminal underworld with ease. He was skilled at spotting hidden quarries and was also skilled in stealth himself. The Wookiee had a penchant for intimidation. He was trained to [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles,<ref name="SotESB" /> and he had good endurance and the skill to cope with survival situations. Although Snoova was literate in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] and able to comprehend the language, his physiology allowed him to speak only Shyriiwook, his native tongue.<ref name="SaV 112" />

==Equipment==
Snoova's preferred weapons were a vibro-ax, [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]],<ref name="AFA 26">''[[Star Wars: The Action Figure Archive]]''</ref> blaster rifle,<ref name="SaV 112" /> [[Light repeating blaster/Legends|light repeating blaster]], and [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]]. He also wore an ammunition [[Bandolier/Legends|bandoleer]] and [[Belt/Legends|belt]]. Other equipment the Wookiee carried included a [[Medpac/Legends|medpac]], satchel,<ref name="SotESB" /> [[Binders/Legends|binders]], [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], and [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]].<ref name="SaV 112" />

The Wookiee utilized a removable device that featured a monocle ocular enhancer that afforded him low-light vision<ref name="SotESB" /> and enhanced visual acuity. After an accident cost the Wookiee his eye, Snoova made the rig a permanent feature when he had it installed as a cybernetic eye patch in his right eye socket.<ref name="SaV 112" /> He often wore a [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldron]] over one shoulder.<ref name="UAGoSaV" /><ref name="Snoova CCG">{{CCG|set=Reflections II: Expanding the Galaxy|cardname=Snoova}}.</ref> When Chewbacca impersonated the bounty hunter, he wore a short [[Cape/Legends|cape]] and a thigh [[Holster/Legends|holster]].<ref name="SOTEc 4" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|I was able to design the Snoova bounty hunter look for Chewbacca, which was a very cool opportunity.|Mark Boudreaux|<ref name="ALTA 34">{{InsiderCite|120|A Long Time Ago, In a Toy Aisle Not So Far Away....}}</ref>}}
[[File:Snoova_figure_concept.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ''Shadows of the Empire'' project afforded Hasbro the chance to design the look of Chewbacca in his Snoova disguise.]]
Snoova was created for the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|''Shadows of the Empire'']] multimedia project, which entered development in [[1994]].<ref name="ASDotBH 36-37">''[[Aurra Sing: Dawn of the Bounty Hunters]]''</ref> Snoova was one of the several new ''Star Wars'' characters designed by the toy company [[Hasbro]] for the project, and both [[Mark Boudreaux]]<ref name="ALTA 34" /> and [[Michael Butkus|Mike Butkus]] have been attributed as the designers of the character.<ref name="ASDotBH 36-37" /> Snoova's look became the basis for a Hasbro action figure of Chewbacca disguised as the Wookiee outlaw, part of the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (toy line)|''Shadows of the Empire'' toy line]],<ref name="Hasbro">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (toy line)|pack=Chewbacca in Bounty Hunter Disguise with Vibro Axe and Heavy Blaster Rifle|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/soteKchewbacca.asp}}</ref> released in [[June]] [[1996]].<ref name="Year by Year">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''</ref> The figure came with a blaster rifle, vibro-ax, and detachable cape.<ref name="Hasbro" />

Snoova was first mentioned in the ''Shadows of the Empire'' multimedia project's [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|eponymous novel]],<ref name="SOTE 22" /> published in [[May]] 1996,<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> via being impersonated by Chewbacca.<ref name="SOTE 22" /> Snoova first appeared in "[[Out of the Picture]]," a short story included in the ''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]'',<ref name="OOTP" /> a roleplaying guide published as part of the multimedia project in June 1996 by [[West End Games]].<ref name="SotESB" /> The ''Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook'' claims Snoova's ocular enhancer is a mere tool used by Snoova,<ref name="SotESB" /> but the sourcebook [[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']],<ref name="SaV 112" /> published on [[November 18]], [[2008]],<ref name="SAV Date Wizards">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/SandV|text=''Scum and Villainy''}}</ref> labels it a cybernetic replacement for a lost eye.<ref name="SaV 112" /> The biography above assumes that both sources are correct, albeit for different periods in Snoova's life.

''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'',<ref name="CSWE III 171" /> published on [[December 9]], [[2008]]<ref name="Penguin TCSWE">{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/160596/the-complete-star-wars-encyclopedia-by-stephen-j-sansweet-pablo-hidalgo-bob-vitas-daniel-wallace/9780345477637|text=The Complete Star Wars® Encyclopedia}}</ref>, presents an image of Chewbacca in his Snoova disguise<ref name="CSWE III 171" />—taken from the cover of [[Shadows of the Empire 4|''Shadows of the Empire'' 4]], which was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="SOTEc 4" /> on [[August 7]], 1996<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54546/star_wars_shadows_of_the_empire_1996_4|text=Star Wars: Shadows Of The Empire (1996) #4}}</ref>—as an image of Snoova himself.<ref name="CSWE III 171" /> In [[2001]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'',<ref name="GB">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref> [[2007]]'s ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'',<ref name="Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron">''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]''</ref> and 2009's ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'' video games,<ref name="Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron">''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]''</ref> players can create a "Wookiee bounty hunter" unit that features Snoova's signature hairstyle and ocular enhancer.<ref name="GB" /><ref name="Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron" /><ref name="Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron" />
